name: Rogz Dog Utility Side Release Collar Small - yellow
shortDescription: Rogz Utility Side Release collar – Small Yellow
description: Rogz Utility Side Release Reflective Dog Collar has a reflective yarn woven into the webbing for night time visibility so that everyone is aware that you & your dog are on an outing. Key Features: Reflective Stitching: Reflective yarn is woven into the webbing for nighttime visibility RogLoc: The Fort Knox of release buckles Low Load Technology: LLT technology reduces the load on the Titanium Plastic buckle through a cleverly positioned load ring Contoured Plastic Component: ROGZ rounded contoured plastic components ensure that every ROGZ collar fits snugly Die-Cast Ring: Custom designed die cast ring (no welding). Electroplated chrome for a tarnish free finish Size: Small 11mm (Neck Size: 25 - 35cm)
